comments.body:
## TDD: Tests from 02fa-fa23 must fail RED before, pass GREEN after

Create plugins/dso/scripts/jira-credential-helper.sh

## Implementation
- Check env for JIRA_URL, JIRA_USER, JIRA_API_TOKEN
- Output DETECTED=var1,var2 and MISSING=var3 lines
- For missing: output GUIDANCE lines with description + URL
- For JIRA_API_TOKEN present: output CONFIRM_BEFORE_COPY marker
- Accept --project=KEY, output JIRA_PROJECT=KEY
- Remove RED marker from .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/jira-credential-helper.sh
- [ ] RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep 'jira-credential-helper.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -qv '\['; }
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Review amendment: Define GUIDANCE line format with prefix (e.g., GUIDANCE_DESC: and GUIDANCE_URL:) so tests can assert on structure, not literal third-party URLs.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — tests in tests/scripts/test-jira-credential-helper.sh, RED marker at [test_detect_all_vars_set] in .test-index, helper script needs: DETECTED/MISSING output, GUIDANCE_DESC/GUIDANCE_URL lines, CONFIRM_BEFORE_COPY marker, --project=KEY flag, JIRA_PROJECT=KEY output
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
